sourceRows.Title: An Exceptionally Simple Theory of Everything
sourceRows.Summary: E8 principal-bundle connection proposal containing Standard Model, gravity, electroweak su(2) x u(1), frame-Higgs, and three-generation structure.
sourceRows.PromotionBoundary: Algebraic/geometric identification lead only; no observed W/Z/H mass source rows, scale, or pole extraction.

sourceRows.Title: There is no Theory of Everything inside E8
sourceRows.Summary: Representation-theory obstruction showing E8 TOE embeddings lack properties required by physical reality.
sourceRows.PromotionBoundary: Blocks naive E8 promotion and requires any E8-like route to supply an explicit physical representation and mass law.

sourceRows.Title: An Explicit Embedding of Gravity and the Standard Model in E8
sourceRows.Summary: Explicitly embeds gravitational and Standard Model gauge-field algebra acting on one fermion generation into E8 through spin(11,3)/GraviGUT structure.
sourceRows.PromotionBoundary: Embedding result only; no W/Z/H pole masses, Higgs potential, VEV source, or GU-local source rows.

sourceRows.Title: Octions: An E8 description of the Standard Model
sourceRows.Summary: Interprets e8(-24) elements as Standard Model objects, including SM gauge algebra, Lorentz algebra, quark/lepton spinors, and GUT substructures.
sourceRows.PromotionBoundary: Strong representation lead; does not derive target-independent electroweak mass parameters or observed W/Z/H states.

sourceRows.Title: E8 x E8 unification with pre-gravitation on octonion-valued twistor space
sourceRows.Summary: Branches one E8 to the Standard Model gauge bosons, Higgs, and left chiral fermions, and a second E8 to a right-sector pre-gravitation analogue.
sourceRows.PromotionBoundary: Uses spontaneous symmetry breaking language and future coupling/Lagrangian work; no completed physical W/Z/H mass law.

sourceRows.Title: Embeddings of the Standard Model in E8
sourceRows.Summary: Recent modified octions route relating weak SU(2) breaking to generation breaking and discussing mass/background dependence.
sourceRows.PromotionBoundary: Current E8 mass lead remains external and background/mass dependent, with no GU-local source-lineage rows or GeV normalization.

decision: Do not promote W/Z or Higgs physical masses from exceptional E8 routes in this repository. The sources supply serious representation and unification leads, including Standard Model gauge algebra, electroweak SU(2) x U(1), Higgs/frame-Higgs objects, generations, and gravity/pre-gravitation embeddings, but they do not supply GU-local E8 branching from Shiab/observer geometry, separate W/Z source rows, physical photon/W/Z/H projection, weak-angle and coupling normalization, target-independent VEV or mass-scale source, Higgs scalar-source/self-coupling lineage, pole extraction, or GeV normalization.
nextRequiredArtifact: A GU-local exceptional-algebra embedding theorem mapping Shiab/observer-sector fields into the E8 or E8 x E8 representation without importing an external model.
A target-independent branching and symmetry-breaking law that produces observed photon/W/Z/H fields and separate W/Z source rows.
A Higgs scalar-source, self-coupling or excitation law, VEV or equivalent mass-scale source, and weak-angle/coupling normalization from the same geometry.
A physical pole extractor and GeV normalization before any E8 route can promote W/Z/H masses.
